# Purchase Fulfillment Automator (Uplizd) - Streamline digital delivery and customer onboarding

## Summary
The Purchase Fulfillment Automator is an intelligent AI workflow designed to bridge the gap between Payhip digital sales and customer engagement. By automatically detecting new purchases, this solution triggers personalized welcome sequences, manages file delivery, and updates internal records, ensuring a seamless post-purchase experience that increases customer satisfaction and reduces manual administrative overhead.
